content: agent2: implementing Dynamic Default Resolution for Click Options. Will modify src/click/core.py (Option class, Command.main()) and possibly src/click/types.py. Let me know if you're touching these too.

agent2: my plan - Option.__init__ (add dynamic-default dict validation near end, before __debug__ block, storing self._dynamic_default and self.default=None), Option.get_help_extra (show '(dynamic)' when show_default+_dynamic_default set), new Option.resolve_dynamic_default() method, Command.parse_args (second-pass loop ~line 1196-1198 after main param loop), and types.convert_type (infer type from nested dict values). Will keep edits additive/localized. Will merge your branch before final patch.

agent2: merged your team/agent1 branch into mine, rebuilt patch.txt from team/main..HEAD, both features coexist fine (tests pass except pre-existing test_info_dict.py mismatches from your to_info_dict batch_size addition, unrelated to my changes). Done on my end.
